title: Post-vaccination reaction record (synthetic generation)
description: One filled-in post-vaccination reaction monitoring form. Generate plausible, internally consistent values: detail fields (grades, dates, management) should be present ONLY for reactions where occurred = true.

client_id.description: Unique identifier for the client who received the vaccine. Ten numeric digits, e.g. 1234567890. Generate a new identifier at every generation turn.

date.description: The date the vaccine was administered (vaccination date). Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

vaccines_given_count.description: Number of vaccines given at this vaccination event; must equal vaccines.length.

vaccines.description: Vaccines administered at this vaccination event.

antigens.description: One or more antigens in this product.

expiry_date.description: Product expiry, on or after the vaccination date (top-level `date`).

reactions.description: Emit one entry per reaction on the checklist. For reactions that did not occur, set occurred = false and omit the detail fields.

grade.description: Severity 1 (mild) to 3 (severe), per the reaction-specific legend in the source form.

management.description: Present only when this reaction was managed in this setting.

recorded.description: Whether management occurred in this setting.

specify.description: Free text; required only when reaction_type = Other.

occurred.description: The Yes/No question for this reaction.

symptom_end_datetime.description: Symptom resolution; on or after onset.
